citations.narrative:
The pigs are housed in multiple pens located in one large room that does not have windows. There was a strong smell of
ammonia noted by the inspector upon entering the room and was strongest at both ends of the room. Although the
ventilation system fans are set to run for a set time each hour, facility personnel determined that the roof-mounted
ventilation fans were not operating properly. As a result, the ventilation system was not providing effective ventilation to
minimize the strong ammonia odor in the housing room.
Per this Section, indoor housing facilities shall be adequately ventilated at all times by natural or mechanical means to
provide for the health of the animals and to prevent discomfort. Indoor housing facilities shall be provided with fresh air
either by means of windows, doors, vents, or fans, and shall be ventilated to minimize odors. The licensee needs to
address the ventilation of the swine housing room to minimize strong ammonia odor for the health of the animals. Correct
by incorporating measures to temporarily address the ammonia odor in the housing room by 2/17/26 followed by
repair/replacement of the roof-mounted ventilation system by 6/12/26.
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representative.
*END OF REPORT*
n

narrative:
3.126(b) 
   
Facilities, indoor. 
The pigs are housed in multiple pens located in one large room that does not have windows. There was a strong smell of 
ammonia noted by the inspector upon entering the room and was strongest at both ends of the room. Although the 
ventilation system fans are set to run for a set time each hour, facility personnel determined that the roof-mounted 
ventilation fans were not operating properly. As a result, the ventilation system was not providing effective ventilation to 
minimize the strong ammonia odor in the housing room.  
 
Per this Section, indoor housing facilities shall be adequately ventilated at all times by natural or mechanical means to 
provide for the health of the animals and to prevent discomfort. Indoor housing facilities shall be provided with fresh air 
either by means of windows, doors, vents, or fans, and shall be ventilated to minimize odors. The licensee needs to 
address the ventilation of the swine housing room to minimize strong ammonia odor for the health of the animals. Correct 
by incorporating measures to temporarily address the ammonia odor in the housing room by 2/17/26 followed by 
repair/replacement of the roof-mounted ventilation system by 6/12/26. 
 
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representative.  
 
*END OF REPORT*
